text: An operator may not drive on or from a limited-access or controlled-access roadway except at an entrance or exit that is established by a public authority.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 545. Operation & Movement of Vehicles
##### § 545.064 — Restricted Access

An operator may not drive on or from a limited-access or controlled-access roadway except at an entrance or exit that is established by a public authority.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: An operator may not drive on or from a limited-access or controlled-access roadway except at an entrance or exit that is established by a public authority.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
